subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Thou through Whose Name the ocean of wealth hath surged in the realm of creation, and by Whose Will the celestial spheres have been set in motion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا من باسمک ماج بحر الغناء فی ناسوت الانشاء و بارادتک تحرکت افلاک
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for nearness to God, @prayer for assistance; intercession
